page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.n1.tiny is an entry-level virtual machine instance belonging to the ecs.n1 family. It features a single dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 processor core operating at 2.5 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. The instance is provisioned with 1.0 GB of system memory and does not include any local NVMe or SSD storage. Virtualization is managed via the KVM hypervisor.

Benchmark evaluations place this instance in the lower performance tiers. The stress-ng single-core and multi-core CPU tests both yield a score of 1087.59, categorizing its processing capability as weak to poor. Memory performance is similarly constrained, with a read-only small block bandwidth of 81.03 GB/sec and uncached large block read and write speeds of 8.5 GB/sec and 7.1 GB/sec respectively. Passmark CPU and memory scores fall into the bottom 10% of tested hardware, reflecting its limited resource allocation.

The primary tradeoff of the ecs.n1.tiny is its highly constrained resource envelope, particularly the 1.0 GB memory limit and the lack of bundled local storage. However, this hardware profile represents a highly cost-efficient option for lightweight, non-resource-intensive tasks. It is suitable for basic utility workloads, simple static web serving, lightweight Redis caching, or low-traffic development and testing environments.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.n1.tiny is an entry-level, x86_64 architecture virtual machine configured with a single dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 core running at 2.5 GHz and 1.0 GB of RAM. It features no local storage or GPU accelerators. Performance benchmarks place this instance in the bottom tiers, with a stress-ng CPU score of 1087.59 and a Passmark CPU score of 1316.17. Memory bandwidth is also limited, recording 8.5 GB/sec for uncached large block reads. Given these resource constraints, the instance offers a cost-efficient profile for minimal, non-intensive workloads. It is best suited for basic static web serving, lightweight Redis operations, and simple development or testing tasks that do not require high memory or processing power.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.n1.tiny is an entry-level virtual server featuring 1 vCPU, 1.0 GB of RAM, and no local storage, designed for lightweight utility workloads and basic development environments.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.n1.tiny is a 1 vCPU, 1.0 GB RAM virtual server built on Intel Xeon 8163 processors, designed for basic, low-resource workloads.
tagline: A minimal, single-core virtual server designed for low-resource utility tasks, basic web serving, and lightweight development environments.
bullet_points: Single dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 core at 2.5 GHz
1.0 GB of system memory with no bundled local storage
KVM hypervisor virtualization on x86_64 architecture
Low-tier CPU and memory benchmark performance
Suitable for lightweight Redis caching and static web serving
